case_title: LARRY LACAYO VS. PEDRO CASTILLO et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LACAYO, LARRY AS TO DEFENDANT CASTILLO, PEDRO ORTEGA, EDDY DOES 1 TO 50 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR APR-06-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-03-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAR-22-2012
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-06-2012 CONTINUED TO MAY-18-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-25-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAY-18-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-25-2012 02:00 PM FOR DEPT 610
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST LARRY LACAYO, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JUN-25-2012, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUL-11-2012. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-25-2012 CONTINUED TO AUG-28-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR AUG-28-2012 02:00 PM FOR DEPT 610
NO APPEARANCE NOR OBJECTION FILED. CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING AUG-28-2012 AT 2:00 PM. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
